scripts.start: node -e "const e=process.env; console.log('RAILWAY_ENV:', e.RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT_NAME); console.log('RAILWAY_SERVICE:', e.RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME); console.log('BOT_TOKEN exists:', 'BOT_TOKEN' in e, 'len:', (e.BOT_TOKEN||'').length); console.log('MONGO_URI exists:', 'MONGO_URI' in e, 'len:', (e.MONGO_URI||'').length)" && node dist/src/server.js
